## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them. -->

## ✅ Checklist
<!-- All boxes must be checked before requesting review. -->
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guide (`uv run ruff check`)
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for the changes I made
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation (docstrings, `docs/`, README)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values are included in this PR
- [ ] My PR targets the `develop` branch, not `main`
